transcript: Speaker A: Very hungry. Speaker B: Starving. Speaker A: Really scared. Speaker B: Terrified. Speaker A: Very tired. Speaker B: Exhausted. Speaker A: Best way to learn English quickly? Speaker B: MySivi. Speaker A: MySivi? What's that? Speaker B: MySivi is an AI teacher that fixes your mistakes instantly. And over 5 million people practice English on MySivi. Speaker A: That's great. So you can talk to the AI? Speaker B: Yes, you can talk to the AI on any topic, and it will correct grammar mistakes and pronunciation without judgment. Speaker A: But isn't that costly? Speaker B: Not at all. You could start at just three rupees. Speaker A: Wow, download MySivi now and start your English journey. Speaker B: Download it, guys.
on_screen_text:
Basic / Advanced
Very hungry / starving
Really scared / Terrified

Best way to learn English quickly? / MySivi
MySivi??? / What's that?
That's great. / So you can talk to the AI?
But isn't that costly? / Not at all.
You could start at just three rupees.
Wow download MySivi now and start your English journey. / Download it guys.
summary: A mother and daughter demonstrate basic versus advanced English vocabulary before introducing MySivi, an AI English-learning app. The daughter explains how the app corrects grammar and pronunciation mistakes instantly without judgment. They highlight its low cost of just three rupees and encourage viewers to download the app to start their English journey.
